title: Newton's Laws of Motion
author: OpenStax
content: Newton's laws of motion describe the relationship between a body and the forces acting upon it. The first law states that an object remains at rest or in uniform motion unless acted upon by a force...

title: Newton’s Method in Numerical Analysis
author: Gilbert Strang
content: Newton's method is an iterative numerical technique used to find roots of real-valued functions. Starting from an initial guess, the method refines the solution...
